comment: Slither configuration for Vaipakam. The exclusions below cover vendored Solidity that Vaipakam doesn't author or compile against directly. In-source Vaipakam suppressions live as `// slither-disable-next-line <detector>` annotations in the .sol files themselves, with a one-line rationale on the preceding comment — so every suppression carries an audit trail. See docs/internal/ProjectProcedures.md §7 for the Slither workflow convention.
